{{Quote|I don't suppose there's any chance the record is a forgery. Something the Emperor might have created with an eye to someday blackmailing the Bothans.|[[Talon Karrde]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
The '''Caamas Document''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Special Files|file]] that implicated a group of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] in the [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]]. Its partial discovery in the debris from [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] precipitated the [[Caamas Document Crisis|political and military crisis]] of the same name.

==History and Controversy==
In its original state, the document detailed the Bothan agents that lowered the [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] of Caamas that allowed the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] to devastate the surface of the peaceful planet. [[Grodin Tierce]], as a part of his plot to destroy the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], altered the document to include the names of prominent [[Clan|Bothan clans]] originally uninvolved in the operation, and ensured copies were stored in secure Imperial vaults and military libraries.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

When a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] copy was uncovered at [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the New Republic fell into a [[Caamas Document Crisis|massive political crisis]].<ref name="Specter of the Past" /> Agents of the [[Imperial Remnant]], particularly [[Drend Navett]], helped to escalate the conflict, eventually leading to a [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|battle at Bothawui]].<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>

One altered copy was obtained by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], given to them by con-artist [[Flim (Human)|Flim]] masquerading as [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], after the two, along with the help of [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] and [[Moegid]] had tried to obtain a copy of the document by searching archives in a library on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. They were immediately suspicious when it named Bothans from a number of leading clans as part of the atrocity. [[Hunt for Jorj Car'das|Other]] [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Galactic Civil War)|attempts]] to gain a copy of the document were made by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Booster Terrik]] under his command, and by [[Talon Karrde]]. The only unaltered copy was [[Mission to Nirauan|acquired]] by [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. The surviving Bothans it named were convicted of war crimes.<ref name="Vision of the Future" />

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' incorrectly states that [[Jorj Car'das]] possessed a copy of the document.<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
